summary: 2026-06-11 20:14:26 PDT — Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, the review note, and the relevant implementation. The server-side persistence/encryption/operator-decryptable/localStorage corrections are supported by the code; I found one minor payload-shape precision issue in the new text.

findings.title: Overlay payload description is narrower than the actual `buildOverlayState` payload
findings.claim: The new text says the side panel pushes only sanitized aggregate numbers, listed as total, per-second, and attendee count. `client/src/lib/overlayState.js` does include those, but it also sends `status`, `elapsedSeconds`, `currency`, `updatedAt`, and an empty `prefs` object. This does not expose private rates or attendee identities, but the documentation is not exact about what reaches the overlay.
findings.suggestion: Adjust the sentence to say the overlay receives aggregate display state, e.g. total, per-second, elapsed time, attendee count, status/currency/timestamp, and explicitly no names, aliases, rate table, or per-person rates.
